title: Napkin processing pass — owner-directed, fitness in target surfaces relaxed
body: Opened claim f8a90a57-6d0d-49a2-a309-dcbe8b93296e under thread practice-fitness. Owner directed a full napkin distillation pass and explicitly relaxed fitness pressure in distilled.md / archive surfaces for this pass: preserve learning first, route resulting fitness pressure to step 9. Plan: read napkin (785 lines) and distilled (407 lines) in full, extract behaviour-changing entries, merge into distilled.md, prune entries already in permanent docs, archive napkin-2026-05-04.md, restart fresh napkin, re-run pnpm practice:fitness:informational, hand back to owner for next-target decision.
